content.text:
Based on the zoomed view of atom C:11, I can now identify its neighboring atoms. Looking at the covalent bonds connected to C:11:

**Neighbor atoms of atom index 11 (C):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 10 | C (Carbon) |
| 12 | O (Oxygen) |
| 13 | O (Oxygen) |

**geomconf_index:** 5290

Atom 11 is the carbon of a carboxylic acid group (-COOH). It is covalently bonded to:
- **C:10** - the carbon from the ring structure to which the carboxylic acid is attached
- **O:12** - the carbonyl oxygen (double-bonded)
- **O:13** - the hydroxyl oxygen (single-bonded to C:11 and also bonded to H:14)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 11, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
